context_for_next_testing_agent: Conoce las piezas module fully expanded with 4 lessons and 6 exercises. Lesson-to-exercise mapping: lesson[0]→ex1, lesson[1]→ex2, lesson[2]→ex3, lesson[3]→ex4. Additional exercises (5=Reina, 6=Alfil) accessible via exercise buttons on practice page. Knight movement shows 8 L-shaped valid moves, Pawn from starting row shows 2 forward moves. All piece movements validated in ChessBoard.jsx isValidMove function.
